prestazioni: Engine: YS23DDTT (2.3L twin-turbo diesel) - BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbo upgrade with 0.86 A/R turbine housing and billet compressor wheel for 350-400whp target, paired with a custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust system by Milltek Sport featuring 409 stainless steel and non-resonated center section for optimized spool and flow

Fuel System: Full Bosch CP4.2 common-rail injection system upgrade with 2,200-bar injectors (Bosch 0445120295) and a supplementary AEM 380LPH in-tank fuel pump to support E85 blends, controlled via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom YS23DDTT-specific maps for boost-by-gear and torque limiting

Drivetrain: ZF 8HP70 8-speed automatic transmission reinforcement with a Punch Powerglide torque converter (3,000 RPM stall) and a custom billet input shaft, paired with a Quaife ATB helical LSD in the rear Dana M226 differential (3.73:1 ratio) and uprated CV joints from GKN Driveline for 500Nm+ torque handling
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Rocket Bunny V3 Navara D23 kit with carbon fiber fender flares (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear), custom aluminum inner fenders, and relocated washer fluid reservoirs for aggressive stance with 285/50R20 Nitto Ridge Grappler tires on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (9.5J ET15 front, 10.5J ET20 rear)

Front End: Seibon Carbon hood with functional dual NACA ducts feeding the BorgWarner EFR turbo and a custom aluminum intercooler core by Bell Intercoolers (40% larger than OEM), paired with a custom front bumper from Liberty Walk featuring integrated LED light bar and tow hooks relocated to the chassis for improved approach angle

Rear End: Custom rear bumper by Overland Vehicle Systems with integrated swing-out tire carrier (20" wheel mount) and dual exhaust exits for the Milltek system, paired with a carbon fiber bed cover from ARE Accessories and a custom rear diffuser by Maxton Design with integrated LED reverse lights and license plate relocation
